textByHash.ea6b68012520e582d261e5bb5b4d974d319f9c96: Hello again. What can I do for you?
textByHash.751a01af38aef5980935a08033aa0e8524fecd9b: I see. It was always unlikely that she'd survive the Abyss.
textByHash.261423bc4e8c6a3feb8045a2028e790324f7ada4: An imposter? What do you mean?
textByHash.a5881c491b3d64c33f1a18e223499681b6ae6f7f: I can't believe it. Persten and I had our differences, but this...
textByHash.0480cb86f7b4a7eeb199fe59e7abf77ba4846827: I'd better share this news with the others. Thank you for bringing it to me.
textByHash.abc54b47a9b7c454e39fe25a353b3ed6b60148f9: Welcome adventurer, to the world renowned Wizards' Tower, home to the Order of Wizards. We are the oldest and most prestigious group of wizards around. Now, how may I help you?
textByHash.fcc08e9d3222410eba479a7efcff2e98b2ac3152: Sedridor? What is it you want with him?
textByHash.f96c29b0a8aafc4f574c4694c402608af40219f4: Did he now? Well hand it over then, and we'll see what all the hubbub is about.
textByHash.cfe3c44cdc1716b482b66c70bc7839821cebe6c7: Hmm... Doesn't seem to be anything too special. Just a normal air talisman by the looks of things. Still, looks can be deceiving. Let me take a closer look...
textByHash.7981788391dae74cc027ca0fa11c7999ce765a68: How interesting... It would appear I spoke too soon. There's more to this talisman than meets the eye. In fact, it may well be the last piece of the puzzle.
textByHash.edcae0ee364a8f444a1881ba3ee813bc5fc6140c: Indeed! The lost legacy of the first tower. This talisman may in fact be key to finding the forgotten essence mine!
textByHash.ba10f49182db601b11c5523f1b7638496ae3b7da: Ah, my apologies, adventurer. Allow me to fill you in.
textByHash.15db26d491401103c86f1ddf3bb0be037cb7cc4b: As you are likely aware, when we cast spells, we do so using the power of runes.
textByHash.2679e2d14f3473c7dd4118f688639d2f59e4484d: These runes are crafted from a highly unique material, and then imbued with magical power from various runic altars. Different altars create different runes with different magical effects.
textByHash.87189bf6eff60cf6eb4938a36cc473b328e6798a: The process of imbuing runes is called runecrafting. Legend has it that this was once a common art, but the secrets of how to do it were lost until just under two hundred years ago.
textByHash.00d01e54052804a097fe14d903ba2bdc2c7e32c8: The rediscovery of runecrafting had such a large impact on the world, that it marked the dawn of the Fifth Age. It also resulted in the birth of our order, and the construction of the first Wizards' Tower.
textByHash.0ef3112f74d16289f989887012f9ebabc37d2181: It was burnt down by traitorous members of our own order. They followed the evil god of chaos, Zamorak, and they wished to claim our magical discoveries in his name.
textByHash.98b6dae15a4783300a79e3cc80510b57d881944b: When the tower burnt down, much was lost, including an important incantation. A spell that could be used to teleport to a hidden essence mine.
textByHash.16f23671f2837bf028c7cc7e041bcb931123c1d2: Precisely. Rune essence is the material used to make runes, but it is incredibly rare. That essence mine was the only place it could be found that our order knew of.
textByHash.262ddd041e3c891f3d5d6e29be2e22900dc6eb18: Since the incantation was lost, we have struggled to maintain our stocks of rune essence.
textByHash.a4b9fd02ec4c39b40b218704876345876e7683a7: There are seemingly those out there that still know where to find some, but while they have been willing to sell essence to us, they have refused to share knowledge on how to find it ourselves.
textByHash.45d0f80c4acca8277e55675af2bc299cfc89a0ad: I do! All magic leaves traces, and from what I can tell, this talisman was used heavily during the time of the first tower.
textByHash.2a726826e4da456cca0e2f24edae9a21c3eee9fe: It would have been taken to the essence mine many times, and the magical energies there will have left an imprint on it. To think that it was hidden in Lumbridge all this time!
textByHash.01d7dd4ab9a47bca7258dc3a2376ad67bf061b8b: It is critical I share this discovery with my associate, Aubury, as soon as possible. He's not much of a wizard, but he's an expert on runecrafting, and his insight will be essential.
textByHash.b8ba02bf96537568a5937b43e466c86333033858: Would you be willing to visit him for me? I would go myself, but I wish to study this talisman some more.
textByHash.d8391805756228e5098297b5216dda338d8d6478: He runs a rune shop in the south east of Varrock. Please, take this package of research notes to him. If all goes well, the secrets of the essence mine may soon be ours once more!
textByHash.eb4c015c6eb39aeb11ffccb1a37f76391f392d87: Really now? I am the Archmage you know.
textByHash.300e193d8394cb78cc4fb12730ec6cea9bd7dfb1: As you wish adventurer. I will continue to study this talisman you have brought me. Return here if you find yourself with some spare time to help me.
textByHash.5e69d71040aa99f70f187fa49534eb7e89c6fc8f: Oh... Well I guess the short of it is that this talisman could be key to helping us rediscover an important teleportation incantation.
textByHash.07df6fab58eaf9854c6ea0c9049ff2cb9b94477f: With it, we'll be able to access a hidden essence mine, our lost source of rune essence.
textByHash.a1346833aedf4fc02e07b447d1e1eb18d2e38c04: Hmm? You are a very odd person. Come back again when you have it.
textByHash.dc40ee8abbd994d26f3ebc8092f656e46c7f58f8: Well good news, for I am Sedridor! Now, hand it over and let me have a proper look at it, hmm?
textByHash.be2263c495c96a45c1634aa7516016e8c6e36e99: Hmm... Well, I admire your caution adventurer. Perhaps I can prove myself? I will use my mental powers to discover...
textByHash.1a3a26aa36ac4d6e4fe007582bddb01b2d66be6a: Well I am the Archmage you know! You don't get to my position without learning a few tricks along the way!
textByHash.36b36bf5b27ecbe9d4cdc4ff007631871f63a625: So now that I have proved myself to you, why don't you hand over that talisman, hmm?
textByHash.b072509086cab2a51f0b9f53daa47dc541e54dc0: Welcome back, adventurer. Do you have that talisman now?
textByHash.6a171aedcfb6bc45cb38236872de6f44fa16925c: Well come back when you have it.
textByHash.2c4a07938b9c4c1248a19820113a56ccf6b2e198: Hello again, adventurer. Please, take this package of research notes to Aubury in Varrock. He runs a rune shop in the south east of the city.
textByHash.30ed902e97634b26ff233a7e665223244d5582a0: Hello again, adventurer. Did you take that package to Aubury?
textByHash.d94b2dbc507b0b44d3c11c302da4bbaf055bb52d: Well it's a good job I have copies of everything.
textByHash.b61ac448627910c5bb0f515b04b216935e97dca9: He runs a rune shop in the south east of Varrock. Please deliver it to him soon.
textByHash.5d5d82eaaf96c2ae340cec4b06c77fad45d5c6e0: Ah. How goes your quest? Have you delivered my research to Aubury yet?
textByHash.a539ec4955a787ed78adec5873d84eb021ba7cd9: Wonderful! Let's have a look then.
textByHash.cd19d5586e5b134ab0cd9d730d3ce9552b29a216: Alright, let's see what Aubury has for us...
textByHash.1fc0ea24c0bed788db890e3c5e62a5efc970488b: Yes, this is it! The lost incantation!
textByHash.a2581e5f5a1fc3c9bcf5b42e19c15b525960ed61: That's right! Because of you, our order finally has a proper source of rune essence again! Thank you, friend.
textByHash.e628cdce615b516c9c0da2f41371e610437731d0: If you ever want to access the essence mine yourself, just let me know. It's the least I can do.
textByHash.ba60bc6d03ed1f36e9f9b69b196be042cfcaa4bf: I will also share the incantation with others, including Aubury. When I do, I'll let them know that you are to be given unlimited access to the mine.
textByHash.5c60cc6e45446192cc1f586055d250be9ceb5510: Oh, and you can have this air talisman back as well. I have no further need of it, and I'm sure you will find it useful.
textByHash.c73719aa3d306a2298a90085f60d29d2452a9de1: In case you didn't know, the talisman can be used to craft air runes. Just take it to the Air Altar south of Falador along with some rune essence.
textByHash.c7501126f32d53be6248b06a8a36776186289e1e: Don't worry if you can't find the altar. The talisman can guide you there. You may find talismans for other altars as well while adventuring. They'll let you craft other types of rune.
textByHash.a0be740e5dc659be236e5df47ad522ac404d91d5: Right... You're rather careless aren't you. I suggest you go and speak to Aubury once more. With luck he will have made copies.
textByHash.52f99442736313e8cf05ff39fa1f8dfb08b91460: So Persten disappears for all this time, and then shows up again with knowledge on an ancient teleportation matrix? I suppose I shouldn't be surprised. It's probably not the strangest thing she's done.
textByHash.051b5c75b0c3938b0cdf94d0c714b799d9e3fb6e: Anyway, what do you need my help with exactly?
textByHash.678434b9a8a641faf64cbc4c6ff140156000a343: I'd very much like to see it. Come back to me when you have it.
textByHash.00804c656329922f0ea209d93bd61d332f37040c: Hmm... this scroll is very interesting. Did you get it from a Zamorakian wizard, perhaps? Don't lie to me.
textByHash.47aed17bd3b52e2dc804f63d4b84ec664d486043: It's clear from your response that my suspicions are correct. This incantation is written on very thin flesh rather than parchment, a horrific practice only used by Zamorakians.
textByHash.4fd65c824961e28fedec03093a7e41481dd6ace4: Need I remind you that it was the Zamorakians who burnt down the first Wizards' Tower?
textByHash.15d9f342fcaebb753806e7c9b6b5d1984b2dc8af: , I'm going to be frank with you. Persten hasn't been seen here for almost a year. My last meeting with her was to discuss changing her line of study due to her lack of results.
textByHash.b6d1b85a56cfc7697e025b94d2247f56d36307ef: She was given one more year to produce something of note. Now, with time almost up, she sends you here with Zamorakian incantations and odd claims about an ancient teleportation matrix.
textByHash.fc8ed052d348b7fb3c209cee0c18781344b4c183: Hmm... You have been a great help to us in the past. For that, I will consider it. First though, I will do a thorough arcane analysis of this incantation to determine if it is safe to cast.
textByHash.799881d1707fb092fd37f9638a774e660783838e: Now, as for your three wizards, I can't be wasting the others' time with this sort of thing, especially when I haven't even agreed to allow it yet.
textByHash.2df74ee6f6c91e123ab01ef6bc0724e1201b2178: However, Traiborn has three new apprentices who could help. This might be a good learning opportunity for them. Speak to him while I inspect this incantation.
textByHash.96250be97a506396370d29427d1598aab2352fe4: I haven't finished my analysis of it yet. While you wait, I suggest you speak with Traiborn. He has three new apprentices who could help you, assuming I agree to let things go ahead.
textByHash.5b4f8080dc35c66aadbe84e62f3e69a46ba97432: Slow down, Persten! I am still inspecting this amulet of yours.
textByHash.8a273352de02705a7b9021241bfc3fd14dc0b342: Not all of us are so carefree when it comes to the rules of our order, Persten. I mean really, Zamorakian incantations! Be glad I've even let you back in the tower!
textByHash.52dd916a986a11a1a7ee4e39ed19a49f944b7131: I can think of a few other unfortunate things...
textByHash.36be6205825cc632fe9438c7a102bf347a517dfa: Anyway, the amulet seems to be safe, and as much as I hate to admit it, your assessment seems to be correct.
textByHash.c1bd9fedc001036eef3f70f674316447e6671d18: Yes. I'm still not happy about this, but we can't throw away this chance. I assume Traiborn's apprentices are ready?
textByHash.f378ce26d2131564334d9ba8ab382eaadc48d6f2: It seems so, assuming you are ready yourself?
textByHash.307e9266ec07c7a0b9927243081d411df172e4aa: We will be here once you are.
textByHash.76dd6af7d7351f44e097eb782b0d21bbfe8ef98e: Go in? You three aren't going through that portal. We have no idea what's on the other side!
textByHash.f7c08e75302aedad769399ed04c64db8b92c64f2: I have given Persten and permission to go through. Until we know it's safe, no one else may enter.
textByHash.bd4eb101f32b98005afce5193145d3fac2bd196b: No. You are only apprentices. You were here to help with the incantation, and you've done that now. You should go back to your studies.
textByHash.93726b76fdf6ce292aca5ecda55b597d17a2e16c: Let it be known that I consider this a bad idea. That said, they are your apprentices, Traiborn. If they have your permission, I won't stop them.
textByHash.18f50fb234712792cd6d5bd7c286b2dcad7ee7ee: I assume so. You should probably go through and join them.
textByHash.7bd709591b468d3f773e8d45afeaeda0edb7db0d: Well you'd better get back there and fix it!
textByHash.0de4c06826aa7b44f8c0b77b417e8aac8e5e5b60: What do you mean? Was there no teleportation matrix?
textByHash.fb22395f1c86214c34f0de63ad58b383d2354bc2: Abyssal creatures? We have to get in there and stop this!
textByHash.7ac0de26205bddbf52edb19f9e73f89151282705: This is a disaster! I knew that teleportation matrix was too good to be true. I should have stopped this, but I was blinded by my own desires for that matrix!
textByHash.d788e4d4ae7ca2228511df5d5f73362336f0ffc9: Then I will ensure they have all the help they need. I will also begin researching this rift at once. Maybe we can still find a way to close it permanently.
textByHash.9afeb135211fd6ecb2942e67fbf255739e3c5937: In the meantime, I suggest you do what you can to help them as well. After all, this is partially your doing.
textByHash.5456a79e2c5c23eda7494ebd7c5022132f610601: Thank you. I appreciate that you did not mean for things to go this way. You should have this. It belonged to Persten. I don't want to think about where she got it.
textByHash.e057973ff1fd0dc2a6254176ab8e7c10062bb759: Sadly, that seems unlikely. Still, if anyone can survive the Abyss, it's her.
textByHash.1f2e4851adb74f2db596c1baea996a74f3141606: Now, we'd better get to work.
textByHash.1f100fc9effa54053fd8c6c2cfde266603c29dac: Between the Guardians of the Rift and ourselves, we are managing to keep the Abyss at bay.
textByHash.076d3f3aa2e00f3da68266459785846078e89f20: However, despite all our research, we are no closer to working out how to close the rift permanently.
textByHash.dc9021cb37b60b8ea32f0066a411f0826d06c9b3: Gaining a better understanding of the artefact that was once there is key, but we have found little mention of this 'Eye'.
textByHash.5fd39606da1eeda4623fcf2532be9cf4c24540f5: I'm sure the wizards of the first tower had plenty of research on it. After all, they knew enough about it to use its symbol as the symbol for our order.
textByHash.e92f119c75aca4ff286c2d097c203f6198e14d37: All that knowledge lost because of those accursed Zamorakians!
textByHash.e3fc340fa2f79456a178fb699ce43e8e23198af6: Anyway, if you wish to help defend the temple, just head through the portal.
textByHash.db8b596a16eb442a05c950cf377090066013bdaf: Of course. The first Wizards' Tower was built at the same time the Order of Wizards was founded. It was at the dawn of the Fifth Age, when the secrets of runecrafting were rediscovered.
textByHash.71c3feaa943682122c141f38a1b91375dddeb09d: For years, the tower was a hub of magical research. Wizards of all races and religions were welcomed into our order.
textByHash.f0b2a7aacf9e70f7753071902875abea37c586e0: Alas, that openness is what ultimately led to disaster. The wizards who served Zamorak, the evil god of chaos, tried to claim our magical discoveries in his name.
textByHash.aa8a341b5017e9347fbdeb8d11f2de45bde98348: They failed, but in retaliation, they burnt the entire tower to the ground. Years of work was destroyed.
textByHash.94679d4a17764d2f7b5bfd44a197465d4a8a7410: The tower was soon rebuilt of course, but even now we are still trying to regain knowledge that was lost.
textByHash.c265d7a96fa00e8ad78bf2eab005fa58b9c82f6b: That's why I spend my time down here, in fact. This basement is all that is left of the old tower, and I believe there are still some secrets to discover here.
textByHash.a828897d557be9689264440c63444866aad3e16b: Of course, one secret I am no longer looking for is the teleportation incantation to the Rune Essence Mine. We have you to thank for that.
textByHash.15d999bd6c95abcc468f72aae83ff4e73884d672: Nothing more than Zamorakian hearsay! They burnt the tower down and are now too cowardly to even admit it!
textByHash.ed73d503cb756fcbf52d5a5181e5b69c51076b0d: Welcome adventurer, to the world renowned Wizards' Tower, home to the Order of Wizards. How may I help you?
textByHash.df0f9b8547a12cec1f32a7ec42df8a3b800d6d05: Well, take care adventurer. You stand on the ruins of the old destroyed Wizards' Tower. Strange and powerful magicks lurk here.
textByHash.ae46dea38c1403f088eaff4515a8750d5565d2de: Hmm... That could be useful. I'll have a dig around and see if we can find any mention of it.
textByHash.7f7b089ff941b2d39227147c5caa4df8e0a2ce6e: Not yet. So far we've still only been able to find a few small mentions of it, but they all call it the Eye.
textByHash.76680c07b989ac1e0625f14cf6526427756c19f3: I'm sure the wizards of the first tower had plenty of research that could have helped. All that knowledge lost because of those accursed Zamorakians!
textByHash.f55bb59d861b89d2b866b25957fbee32a5dc97eb: Apart from myself, there's also Aubury in Varrock, Wizard Cromperty in East Ardougne, Brimstail in the Tree Gnome Stronghold and Wizard Distentor in Yanille's Wizards' Guild.
textByHash.4a22e222d5a2aa5a5d1480c858038f1bdf298ba6: Well, take care. You stand on the ruins of the old destroyed Wizards' Tower. Strange and powerful magicks lurk here.
